stories.headline: Will Anderson Jr. Becomes Highest-Paid Non-QB in History
stories.editorial_direction: Historic contract resets the market. 3 years into his career and already breaking records. Financial absurdity meets elite production. Compare to QB money, compare to his draft class.

tweets.text:
Compensation update: Now that he has passed his physical and the trade is official, newly-acquired DT Dexter Lawerence is signing a one-year, $28 million contract extension with the Bengals, per @WinSportsGroup 

So in the end, Lawrence gets the trade he wanted while being contractually tied to Cincinnati for the next three seasons.

2026 playoff Game 1 leaders:

PTS — Cade Cunningham
REB — Josh Hart
AST — LeBron James
STL — Bruce Brown
BLK — KAT, Ant

key_stats: 2nd in DPOY voting behind Myles Garrett
historical_context: Texans traded up to get him after drafting CJ Stroud #2
financial_absurdity: More per year than some QBs
cross_connections: Edge rusher market now mirrors QB market
Draft 3 years ago, already reset the position
Texans have $50M pass rusher and $55M QB on rookie deals
meme_angles: From college to generational wealth in 3 years
research_notes.where_it_goes: Sets market for other young edge rushers coming up for extensions. Teams will now prioritize edge rushers like QBs in the draft
research_notes.internet_sentiment: Respect for the bag, but also shock at the money being paid to non-QBs now
research_notes.trending_memes: Agent victory lap tweets, Jonathan Greenard celebrating his former teammate

stories.headline: AJ Brown Is 'Likely' Becoming a Patriot
stories.editorial_direction: Eagles finally ready to move on after all the drama. Patriots get their WR1. Schefter using strong language - 'likely' means it's happening.

tweets.text:
A.J. Brown is likely to become a Patriot post June 1, per ESPN sources.

This and more in ESPN's annual NFL Draft intel column:

https://www.espn.com/nfl/draft2026/story/_/id/48507444/2026-nfl-draft-notes-intel-buzz-adam-schefter-first-round-picks-teams-trades

The Eagles remain open to trading AJ Brown, the Patriots remain highly interested in acquiring the star receiver, and conversations are expected to resume shortly on or before June 1, likely culminating in a deal, per league sources.

As one source said about the Patriots' pursuit of Brown, they'll "definitely be engaging then."

A trade to New England is now considered likely.

A jam-packed notebook by Schefty with essential draft information.

And: the number 11 jersey is currently available in New England.

research_notes.key_context: Eagles have been shopping Brown after sideline incidents and contract disputes from last season
research_notes.patriots_angle: Need WR1 desperately, have cap space post-June 1 for salary dump trades
research_notes.timing_significance: June 1 designation allows Eagles to spread cap hit over multiple years
research_notes.meme_potential: Patriots finally getting an elite receiver, Eagles dysfunction continues

stories.headline: Wemby Drops 35 in Playoff Debut, Breaks Spurs Record
stories.editorial_direction: Historic debut. Most points ever by a Spurs rookie in playoffs, passing Tim Duncan. The chosen one arrives.

tweets.text:
WEMBY DOMINATED GAME 1 👽

• 35 PTS
• 5 REB
• 2 BLK

Most points EVER in a Spurs Playoff debut, passing Tim Duncan. 

The Blazers ARE IN TROUBLE

Points in their first playoff game:

35 — Wemby
32 — Duncan
26 — Robinson
21 — Parker
20 — Gervin

Legends.

Spurs went from David Robinson to Tim Duncan to Victor Wembanyama…

This the kinda greed they talked about in the Bible 😭😭

research_notes.historic_context: Passed Tim Duncan's 32 points for most by Spurs rookie in playoffs
research_notes.franchise_continuity: Robinson → Duncan → Wembanyama generational center pipeline
research_notes.performance_details: 35 points, 5 rebounds, 2 blocks in Game 1 win over Blazers
research_notes.meme_angle: Spurs' ridiculous luck with generational big men continues

stories.headline: Cardinals Eyeing RB Surprise at No. 3 Overall?
stories.editorial_direction: Schefter dropping draft intel. RB at #3 would be shocking but Cardinals have needs everywhere.

tweets.text:
There is growing chatter in league circles that Notre Dame running back Jeremiyah Love is in play with Arizona at No. 3 overall. Ideally, the Cardinals would like to find a team willing to trade up so they can acquire more picks, and there have already been "exploratory" calls, as one source described it, regarding the No. 3 selection. But if the Cardinals hold on to their pick, some around the league believe they could pull an early draft surprise and select Love.

https://www.espn.com/nfl/draft2026/story/_/id/48507444/2026-nfl-draft-notes-intel-buzz-adam-schefter-first-round-picks-teams-trades

research_notes.surprise_factor: RB at #3 overall would be huge shock, hasn't happened since Saquon in 2018
research_notes.cardinals_logic: Have James Conner but need explosive playmaker, Love is generational talent
research_notes.trade_possibility: Cardinals prefer to trade down for more picks but Love is backup plan

stories.headline: Dexter Lawrence Gets His Wish and His Bag
stories.editorial_direction: Trade done, extension signed. Lawrence forced his way out of New York and immediately got paid in Cincinnati.

tweets.text:
Compensation update: Now that he has passed his physical and the trade is official, newly-acquired DT Dexter Lawerence is signing a one-year, $28 million contract extension with the Bengals, per @WinSportsGroup 

So in the end, Lawrence gets the trade he wanted while being contractually tied to Cincinnati for the next three seasons.

research_notes.trade_details: Giants get #10 pick, Lawrence gets $28M extension immediately
research_notes.player_power: Lawrence demanded trade or new deal, got both by forcing his way out

around_the_league.text: Steelers left tackle Broderick Jones suffered a setback to the neck injury he sustained last season, and is scheduled to be examined this week to determine whether he will be ready for training camp and/or the start of the season, per league sources.

7 REB
7 AST

The first Spurs point guard with a 15/5/5 playoff game since Tony Parker.

INSANE: The Orlando Magic were the only playoff road team this weekend to win a game 😳

4 days ago the Magic looked like they were ready for vacation in cancun 😭

2 goals
3 points
3 hits
+3

21:11 TOI

Scored the OT winner to seal the hat trick and win game one.

Not an MVP candidate.

NFC North updates:

🏈Vikings restricted free agent LB Ivan Pace signed his tender today, per his agents Drew Rosenhaus and Kyle Lincoln.

closer.hook: Draft week energy with playoff chaos

tweets.text:
LeBron is the closest thing we've seen to a pegasus. 

There are unicorns everywhere in our world that we marvel at.

But there's one that stands out. 

One that feels so heavenly, so divine, evoking a feeling that doesn't feel Earthly.

That is LeBron James.
